fullArticle:
Paramount-Warner merger: could it reshape the media?

The UK is considering intervening in the Paramount-Skydance acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery over concerns about media plurality. But the story may be more than meets the eye, with Larry and David Ellison, the billionaires behind this merger, and their political ties potentially reshaping the media landscape.

Al Jazeera Marah Rayan explains...
